channel.title: Anyone managed to integrate Amazon Pay?
channel.description:
Curious if anyone has managed to either create an amazon pay package or how did you go around integrating amazon pay to frontity?
Super lost, any input highly valued.
We are using > https://cocart.xyz

item.title: Anyone managed to integrate Amazon Pay?
item.dc:creator: santoshdevnath15
item.description:
hi @carlitos.virreira, welcome to frontity.

I loved to do custom work on Frontity, but I really never created anything for Amazon Pay, but I can try a bit if you share your code on Github and give the key of your CoCart

Read full topic
item.source: Anyone managed to integrate Amazon Pay?
